prestazioni: Forced induction conversion using a Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) on the 4.3L 3GR-FSE V6 (362hp stock), paired with a Tomei 260° duration camshaft kit (11.5mm lift) and a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust system with a Fujitsubo Giken Legalis R muffler for JASMA compliance

Full bolt-on internals upgrade including JUN forged pistons (8.5:1 compression), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a Tomei Type-S head gasket for the 3GR-FSE, mated to a Koyoritsu 1,000cc/min fuel pump and ID1000 injectors with a Haltech Elite 2500 ECU for standalone management

Chassis reinforcement via a Cusco Type-RS 6-point bolt-in roll cage (GRMN-spec) and a TRD Japan 4-piston front brake kit (356mm rotors) with Endless CC-RG6 brake pads, paired with Tein Flex Z coilovers (8kg/mm front, 6kg/mm rear spring rates) and a Whiteline 24mm rear sway bar
estetica: Vertex Lang II widebody kit (GRMN-inspired) with custom carbon fiber front splitter and rear diffuser, finished in Toyota Super White II (040) with a 3M 1080 Gloss Black wrap on the roof and pillars

Rays Volk Racing TE37SL wheels (19x9.5 +15 front, 19x10.5 +25 rear) in Hyper Silver with Toyo R888R tires (255/35/19 front, 285/30/19 rear), paired with a custom GRMN-style rear wing (carbon fiber, 1,200mm span) from Auto Produce Boss

Full interior overhaul with Bride Zeta III bucket seats (GRMN-spec recliners), a Nardi Classic 380mm steering wheel (perforated leather), and a custom GRMN-style gauge cluster overlay (Defi Advance BF series) with a Takata Drift III 4-point harness
